title: Cursed Music Discs
description: Experience Minecraft like never before with a cursed resource pack that twists the familiar into the unsettling, turning your world into a haunting, eerie nightmare
body:
Cursed Music Discs is a hilariously awkward and meme filled resource pack that completely overhauls Minecraft's music discs with quirky, offbeat, and downright bizarre tunes. Each track is designed to make players laugh, cringe, or scratch their heads in confusion, featuring unexpected sound effects, weird remixes, and random audio snippets from internet memes. From absurd soundbites to awkwardly timed pauses, this pack brings a lighthearted and chaotic vibe to the game.

You can obtain these cursed music discs just like in vanilla by having a skeleton shoot a creeper or instantly with the /function command. Whether you're in it for a laugh or just want a break from the usual soundtrack, Cursed Music Discs guarantees to keep you entertained with its unexpected and wacky twists!
